creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 212026
svn diff for net/nakenchat

net/nakenchat is being sent back to the pool ( bug #244454 )
and I'd like to pick it up.
DO NOTE the attached patch incorporates everything in neels
patch. The *only* effective difference, is that my name is
set as maintainer. Instead of ports@.

CHANGES
Makefile
distinfo

That's it!

Thanks!

--Chris
